title: Transforming PR Strategy With Artificial Intelligence
description: Transforming PR strategy with Artificial Intelligence at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence”, organize
html: Transforming PR strategy with Artificial Intelligence at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence”, organized by the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR), Lagos state chapter.
